prompt:
You are shown one page from a SEC 10-K filing rendered as an image.
Item "1. Business" ENDS on this page; the next section is "Item 1A. Risk Factors".
Locate the bottom edge of Item 1's text on the page.
- If the "Item 1A" heading is visible on this page, then Item 1 ends on the line directly ABOVE that heading.
- Otherwise, Item 1 continues to the bottom of the page.
Then transcribe VERBATIM the LAST 5 lines of Item 1 immediately before it ends. These must be the FINAL lines right before the section ends, NOT lines from the top or middle of the page. Ignore running headers, page numbers, footers.
Output ONLY the transcribed text, no commentary, no quotes, no formatting.
text:
relations website at ir.tesla.com as soon as reasonably practicable after we electronically file or furnish such information with the SEC. The
information posted on our website is not incorporated by reference into this Annual Report on Form 10-K.
